policy: Use current curated references as maintained AgriMap guidance and raw immutable examples as compatibility evidence. Always preserve owner decisions and active-project contracts.

frontend-main.note: Renumbered and de-duplicated 2026-07-16; aligned to the current application standard and tooling. Sections 11-12 add the generated API and mandatory test contracts.

frontend-libraries.note: Authored 2026-07-16 from the Angular 21 multi-library workspace. Documents published API, per-library generated APIs, environment injection, naming, Playground, and test baselines.
knownIssues: legacy naming/style inconsistency across libraries; do not mass-refactor
ui-kit native-event output names are a published compatibility contract
auth-client pins @agrimap/ui-kit at an exact version
Presentation DTO leakage into repository boundaries
ambiguous Domain versus persistence model placement
illustrative .json files are not valid JSON fixtures

backend-libraries.note: Owner-maintained AgriMap.Platform library references with public behavior, configuration, and Playground usage.
knownIssues: published API and active source remain authoritative when a reference is older than the target package
the auth-flow handoff includes project integration decisions that must be confirmed in the target service

sql.note: Contains current AgriMap schema/deployment references and legacy-compatible raw examples. Inspect each manifest entry before use.
